task_summary: OpenClaw skill missing after plugin install
failure_symptom: Plugin loaded but the skill never appeared in openclaw skills list or check output.
root_cause: The plugin manifest bundled no skills path, so OpenClaw discovered the extension without exposing the skill.
fix: Add skills/TotalReClaw to openclaw.plugin.json, restart the gateway, and re-run openclaw skills check.

task_summary: Tool dispatch returned tool not available
failure_symptom: Running a skill command returned Tool not available even though the plugin loaded.
root_cause: The plugin never registered a tool named totalreclaw or the command-tool frontmatter did not match the registered tool name.
fix: Register the totalreclaw tool in the plugin and keep command-tool: totalreclaw in SKILL.md.

failure_symptom: Plugin config changed but the gateway kept serving stale behavior.
root_cause: The OpenClaw service was never restarted after updating the runtime config.
fix: Run openclaw config validate, then openclaw gateway restart.

failure_symptom: Plugin config changed but the gateway kept serving stale behavior.
root_cause: The developer was running the gateway in the foreground instead of the service manager.
fix: If the gateway is not installed as a service, stop the foreground process and run openclaw gateway run again with the new config.
